'''nayoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiapei|xiapei]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiapei|xiapei]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nayoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næyeheth|næyeheth]] || [[word:næyehej|næyehej]] || [[word:næyehesh|næyehesh]] || [[word:næyehe|næyehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nayoyohoth|nayoyohoth]] || [[word:nayoyohoj|nayoyohoj]] || [[word:nayoyohosh|nayoyohosh]] || [[word:nayoyoho|nayoyoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nayohoth|nayohoth]] || [[word:nayohoj|nayohoj]] || [[word:nayohosh|nayohosh]] || [[word:nayoho|nayoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nayofhoth|nayofhoth]] || [[word:nayofhoj|nayofhoj]] || [[word:nayofhosh|nayofhosh]] || [[word:nayofhof|nayofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nayohotho|nayohotho]] || [[word:nayohojo|nayohojo]] || [[word:nayohosho|nayohosho]] || [[word:nayohoko|nayohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nayohoth|nayohoth]] || [[word:nayohoj|nayohoj]] || [[word:nayohosh|nayohosh]] || [[word:nayoho|nayoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nayohothol|nayohothol]] || [[word:nayohojol|nayohojol]] || [[word:nayohoshol|nayohoshol]] || [[word:nayohokol|nayohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nayohothotho|nayohothotho]] || [[word:nayohojojo|nayohojojo]] || [[word:nayohoshosho|nayohoshosho]] || [[word:nayohoko|nayohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nayohothon|nayohothon]] || [[word:nayohojon|nayohojon]] || [[word:nayohoshon|nayohoshon]] || [[word:nayohokon|nayohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nayohothoro|nayohothoro]] || [[word:nayohojoro|nayohojoro]] || [[word:nayohoshoro|nayohoshoro]] || [[word:nayohokoro|nayohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
